abilities.name: A Word In Your Ear
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action targeting this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) or discard a card to give the attacker a Paranoia token.

abilities.name: Life Leech
abilities.text: When an enemy model activates within 2" of this model, deal +1 damage to it for each model with this ability within 2" of it.

abilities.name: (unusual_defense) Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Fears Given Form
actions.effects: Target gains a Paranoia token. If this attack receives a raise, this model may make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Exploit Apathy
triggers.text: Another ally within 3" of the target may declare a non-Charge action.

actions.name: Self Loathing
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose one of the target's actions. X is equal to the Dmg of the chosen action.

triggers.name: They Laugh At You...
triggers.text: Target gains a Fragile Ego token and declares an attack action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: The Box Opens
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Enemy models within range must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Spreading Fear
triggers.text: Deal 2 damage to enemies with a Paranoia token that fail this duel.

triggers.name: Mass Delusion
triggers.text: Move enemy models that fail this duel up to 3" and give them a Paranoia token.
